_meta.derivation: earliest commit per author_login from commits.json; enrich via /commits/{sha} for files/stats

data.author: cottsay
data.message:
Add missing build tool dependency on 'git' (#16)

Signed-off-by: Scott K Logan <logans@cottsay.net>

files.patch:
@@ -16,6 +16,7 @@
   <author email="jjperez@ekumenlabs.com">Jorge J. Perez</author>
 
   <buildtool_depend>ament_cmake</buildtool_depend>
+  <buildtool_depend>git</buildtool_depend>
 
   <test_depend>ament_lint_auto</test_depend>
   <test_depend>ament_lint_common</test_depend>

+Forthcoming

+* Mirror rolling to master
+* Contributors: Audrow Nash
+
 0.3.0 (2022-04-29)
 ------------------

data.author: ahcorde
data.message:
Update hash to fix windows failures (#39)

Signed-off-by: Alejandro Hernández Cordero <ahcorde@gmail.com>

files.patch:
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@ find_package(ament_cmake_vendor_package REQUIRED)
 
 ament_vendor(mimick_vendor
   VCS_URL https://github.com/ros2/Mimick.git
-  VCS_VERSION 4dbd495e9f3d87a83c3201ef9d851e85f7133db7
+  VCS_VERSION 1e138b0e13da99278453dc96af954890d9f48348
 )
 
 ament_export_dependencies(mimick)

@@ -2,6 +2,12 @@
 Changelog for package mimick_vendor
 ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
 
+Forthcoming
+-----------
+* Bump vendored mimick version for `ros2/Mimick#32 <https://github.com/ros2/Mimick/issues/32>`_ (`#35 <https://github.com/ros2/mimick_vendor/issues/35>`_)
+* Update to the commit that fixes mmk_noreturn. (`#34 <https://github.com/ros2/mimick_vendor/issues/34>`_)
+* Contributors: Chris Lalancette, Michael Carroll
+
 0.6.0 (2023-11-06)
 ------------------
 * Update to the commit the fixes exe stack on macOS. (`#33 <https://github.com/ros2/mimick_vendor/issues/33>`_)

data.author: mjcarroll
data.message:
Update to take advantage of TARGET_ARCH (#28)

Signed-off-by: Michael Carroll <michael@openrobotics.org>

files.patch:
@@ -4,15 +4,9 @@ project(mimick_vendor)
 find_package(ament_cmake REQUIRED)
 find_package(ament_cmake_vendor_package REQUIRED)
 
-set(CMAKE_ARGS)
-if(WIN32 AND "${CMAKE_SYSTEM_PROCESSOR}" MATCHES "^(x86_|x86-|AMD|amd|x)64$")
-  list(APPEND CMAKE_ARGS -Ax64)
-endif()
-
 ament_vendor(mimick_vendor
   VCS_URL https://github.com/ros2/Mimick.git
-  VCS_VERSION de11f8377eb95f932a03707b583bf3d4ce5bd3e7
-  CMAKE_ARGS ${CMAKE_ARGS}
+  VCS_VERSION e300cc88ed828e41ee8548b489bc0b64b2b6436e
 )
 
 ament_export_dependencies(mimick)

+  <version>0.4.0</version>

data.author: hidmic
data.message:
Configure MSVC x64 builds when appropriate. (#1)

Signed-off-by: Michel Hidalgo <michel@ekumenlabs.com>

files.patch:
@@ -7,6 +7,12 @@ find_package(ament_cmake REQUIRED)
 macro(build_mimick)
 
   set(extra_cmake_args)
+  if(WIN32)
+    if("${CMAKE_SYSTEM_PROCESSOR}" MATCHES "^(x86_|x86-|AMD|amd|x)64$")
+      list(APPEND extra_cmake_args -A x64)
+    endif()
+  endif()
+
   if(DEFINED CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE)
     list(APPEND extra_cmake_args -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE})
   endif()
@@ -39,15 +45,15 @@ macro(build_mimick)
   else()
     list(APPEND extra_cmake_args "-DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=${CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER}")
   endif()
-  
+
   include(ExternalProject)
   externalproject_add(mimick-ext
     GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/hidmic/Mimick
     GIT_TAG hidmic/cxx-compatibility
     TIMEOUT 6000
     CMAKE_ARGS
-    -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/${PROJECT_NAME}_install
-    ${extra_cmake_args}
+      -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/${PROJECT_NAME}_install
+      ${extra_cmake_args}
   )
 
   # The external project will install to the build folder, but we'll install that on make install.

+* Export include directories (`#13 <https://github.com/ros2/mimick_vendor/issues/13>`_)
+* Update package maintainers (`#10 <https://github.com/ros2/mimick_vendor/issues/10>`_)
+* Contributors: Michel Hidalgo, Stephen Brawner
+
 0.2.2 (2020-09-18)
 ------------------
 * Suppress cppcheck for MMK_MANGLE\_ (`#8 <https://github.com/ros2/mimick_vendor/issues/8>`_)

@@ -4,7 +4,7 @@

 <package format="2">

data.author: Blast545
data.message:
First iteration vendor for Mimick library

Signed-off-by: Jorge Perez <jjperez@ekumenlabs.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,96 @@
+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.5)
+
+project(mimick_vendor)
+
+find_package(ament_cmake REQUIRED)
+
+macro(build_mimick)
+
+  set(extra_cmake_args)
+  if(DEFINED CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE)
+    list(APPEND extra_cmake_args -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE})
+  endif()
+
+  if(DEFINED CMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE)
+    list(APPEND extra_cmake_args "-DCMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE=${CMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE}")
+    if(ANDROID)
+      if(DEFINED ANDROID_ABI)
+        list(APPEND extra_cmake_args "-DANDROID_ABI=${ANDROID_ABI}")
+      endif()
+      if(DEFINED ANDROID_CPP_FEATURES)
+        list(APPEND extra_cmake_args "-DANDROID_CPP_FEATURES=${ANDROID_CPP_FEATURES}")
+      endif()
+      if(DEFINED ANDROID_FUNCTION_LEVEL_LINKING)
+        list(APPEND extra_cmake_args "-DANDROID_FUNCTION_LEVEL_LINKING=${ANDROID_FUNCTION_LEVEL_LINKING}")
+      endif()
+      if(DEFINED ANDROID_NATIVE_API_LEVEL)
+        list(APPEND extra_cmake_args "-DANDROID_NATIVE_API_LEVEL=${ANDROID_NATIVE_API_LEVEL}")
+      endif()
+      if(DEFINED ANDROID_NDK)
+        list(APPEND extra_cmake_args "-DANDROID_NDK=${ANDROID_NDK}")
+      endif()
+      if(DEFINED ANDROID_STL)
+        list(APPEND extra_cmake_args "-DANDROID_STL=${ANDROID_STL}")
+      endif()
+      if(DEFINED ANDROID_TOOLCHAIN_NAME)
+        list(APPEND extra_cmake_args "-DANDROID_TOOLCHAIN_NAME=${ANDROID_TOOLCHAIN_NAME}")
+      endif()
+    endif()
+  else()
+    list(APPEND extra_cmake_args "-DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=${CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER}")
+  endif()
+  
+  # list(APPEND extra_cmake_args "-DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS=${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS}")
+  # list(APPEND extra_cmake_args "-DSPDLOG_BUILD_TESTS=OFF")
+  # list(APPEND extra_cmake_args "-DSPDLOG_BUILD_EXAMPLE=OFF")
+  
+  # if(NOT WIN32)
+  #   # TODO(karsten1987): re-address this once upstream ticket is resolved:
+  #   # https://github.com/fmtlib/fmt/issues/1604
+  #   list(APPEND extra_cmake_args "-DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS=${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS} -Wno-sign-conversion")
+  #   list(APPEND extra_cmake_args "-DSPDLOG_BUILD_SHARED=ON")
+  # endif()
+
+  include(ExternalProject)
+  # Get Mimick ros2 fork
+  # externalproject_add(mimick-ext
+  #   URL https://github.com/Snaipe/Mimick/archive/v0.3.0.zip
+  #   # GIT_TAG 5a07c19
+  #   # DOWNLOAD_NO_EXTRACT TRUE
+  #   TIMEOUT 6000
+  #   CMAKE_ARGS
+  #     -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/${PROJECT_NAME}_install
+  #     ${extra_cmake_args}
+  # )
+
+  externalproject_add(mimick-ext
+    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/Snaipe/Mimick/
+    GIT_TAG master
+    TIMEOUT 6000
+    CMAKE_ARGS
+      -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/${PROJECT_NAME}_install
+      ${extra_cmake_args}
+  )
+
+  # The external project will install to the build folder, but we'll install that on make install.
+  install(
+    DIRECTORY
+      ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/${PROJECT_NAME}_install/
+    DESTINATION
+      ${CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX}
+  )
+endmacro()
+
+build_mimick()
+
+ament_export_libraries(mimick)
+ament_export_dependencies(mimick)
+
+# TODO(blast545): This section and package.xml should be updated once copyright auto is solved. See: https://github.com/ament/ament_lint/issues/237
+if(BUILD_TESTING)
+  find_package(ament_lint_auto REQUIRED)
+  ament_lint_auto_find_test_dependencies()
+endif()
+
+# this ensures that the package has an environment hook setting the PATH
+ament_package()

@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@

+be under the Apache 2 License, as dictated by that
+[license](http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0.html):

+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+<?xml-model
+  href="http://download.ros.org/schema/package_format2.xsd"
+  schematypens="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"?>
+<package format="2">
+  <name>mimick_vendor</name>
+  <version>0.0.1</version>
+  <description>
+    Wrapper around mimick, it provides an ExternalProject build of mimick.
+  </description>
+  <maintainer email="TODO@todo.com">TBD</maintainer>
+  <license>Apache License 2.0</license>  <!-- the contents of this package are Apache 2.0 -->
+  <license>MIT</license>  <!-- mimick is MIT -->
+
+  <url type="website">https://github.com/Snaipe/Mimick</url>
+
+  <buildtool_depend>ament_cmake</buildtool_depend>
+
+  <depend>mimick</depend>
+
+  <test_depend>ament_lint_auto</test_depend>
+  <test_depend>ament_lint_common</test_depend>
+
+  <export>
+    <build_type>ament_cmake</build_type>
+  </export>
+</package>
